silver_deficit_closed.detail: 6th consecutive year of deficit. Projected 200Moz deficit for 2026. COMEX registered inventory down to 88.78Moz from 167.7Moz in Oct 2025 (47% drop in 5 months). March 2026 delivery: 10,526 contracts stood for 52.63Moz — 59.3% of all registered silver demanded in single delivery month.

mexico_moratorium_reversed.detail: Sheinbaum confirmed: 'no new mining concessions will be granted' during her term (through 2030). 1,126 concessions covering 889,502ha returned to state. Investment fell from $500M (2023) to $400M (2025). HOWEVER: Economy Minister Ebrard announced plans to 'accelerate mining exploration in 2026' by streamlining permits for EXISTING concessions. This is NOT a reversal — no NEW concessions, but faster processing of pending ones.
mexico_moratorium_reversed.severity: PARTIAL SIGNAL — Ebrard push may slightly increase output from existing mines

china_export_restrictions_lifted.detail: No evidence of China lifting silver strategic material classification or export restrictions.

silver_substitute_found.detail: Longi, Jinko pursuing copper paste for solar cells. Mass production Q2 2026 target. Not yet at scale. Even if successful, only affects solar demand (~25% of total). Other 75% (electronics, EVs, data centers, 5G, nuclear, medical) has no substitute.

m2_expansion_reversed.detail: M2 at $22.44T in Jan 2026, continuing to expand.

AG_first_majestic.note: Record 2025 production (31.1Moz AgEq). Increased dividend. Strong margins at $84+ silver.

HL_hecla.note: Lower milled-grade at Greens Creek + Casa Berardi. $255-$279M capex planned. Record $55M exploration.
HL_hecla.flag: DECLINING ORE GRADES — largest US silver producer shrinking output

comex_march_crisis.detail: March 2026 COMEX delivery: 52.63Moz demanded against 88.78Moz registered. 59.3% of all registered silver demanded in single month. Multiple analysts flagging 'default risk' and 'paper vs physical divergence'. If squeeze intensifies, could force price discovery above paper market.

ebrard_permit_acceleration.detail: Mexico Economy Minister Ebrard pushing to streamline permit approvals for EXISTING concessions in 2026. Not a moratorium reversal, but could marginally increase output from existing mines. Monitor for actual production numbers Q2-Q3 2026.

silver_180pct_from_jan2025.detail: Silver trading at $86.51, up from $31 in Jan 2025. +180% in ~14 months. Historic move. Risk of mean reversion vs structural deficit continuation.

screen_verdict.new_risks: COMEX delivery stress (bullish for physical, risky for paper), Ebrard permit push (marginal bearish for supply thesis)
screen_verdict.action: PAPER TRADE — Continue monitoring. Do NOT chase at +180% from Jan 2025 lows without pullback entry.
